blockingIssues.description: `ResponseWriter.write` is typed as returning `void`, but codegen emits the raw Go `http.ResponseWriter.Write` call, so value-position uses like `let n = w.write("hello");` pass `rgoc` and only fail later in `go build` with an assignment-mismatch error.

rejectedObservations.observation: Clarify the `.factory/library/go-interop.md` contract for `w.write` to state whether the underlying Go `(int, error)` result is exposed in rgo, discarded, or forbidden in value position.
